---
title: "Exploratory Analysis"
author: "Author"
date: "2026-05-17"
output: html_document
---

01_network_measures.Rmd: Calculates network metrices and saves the results as a long format panel data in the`cleaned` sub-folder of data folder.It also produces `Fig2.tiff` file and saves it in the 'results' folder.

02_line_plots.ipynb: Plots `Fig1.tiff` and saves it in the 'results' folder. 

03_coefficient_plots.Rmd: It uses the STERGM results and produces `Fig3.tiff` file and saves it in the 'results' folder.
